message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="team-lead" summary="All done, shutting down team">
All work complete. Great session — the Driver-Reviewer model worked well, zero concurrent edit conflicts. The consensus-before-push pipeline is now codified. Shutting down the team. Thank you all.
</teammate-message>

input.content:
Good session. From a design perspective, the app is in solid shape:

- Design token system is complete and consistently used across all components
- All CSS gaps I flagged are resolved
- Visual hierarchy is clear throughout -- primary actions stand out, secondary actions are appropriately subdued
- All states are designed: empty, error, editing, completed
- Inline editing maintains spatial stability (no layout shift)
- Focus management ensures keyboard users stay oriented after every DOM change

Ready for shutdown.
